about.title: About Me
about.text1: I'm a Full-Stack Developer focused on building scalable applications, from database modeling to user experience. Currently studying Systems Analysis and Development, I work with modern technologies with a stronger focus on Python(Django) on the back-end and React.js on the front-end.
about.text2: More than just writing code, I'm driven by continuous learning and aim to grow through real-world practice in the tech industry. I'm looking for my first opportunity in the field, bringing a strong desire to absorb knowledge from experienced teams, quickly master new architectures, and deliver real value to projects.
